name: The Birdhouse- Bayville
address: 4912 Rutherford Rd Suite 105, Virginia Beach, VA 23455
about: The Birdhouse is a membership-based indoor golf practice and performance facility located in Virginia Beach, with two locations: Oceana and Bayville. The facilities are fully powered by Trackman technology, which is considered the most accurate golf simulator and launch monitor in the world. Membership is limited to roughly 100 members per location and operates on a three-month minimum commitment, followed by a month-to-month agreement. Onboarding includes a facility tour, a PIN code for door access, and training on the Trackman software to enable self-sufficient practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade Trackman technology for detailed swing analysis
Membership tiers offer flexible pricing to accommodate different practice schedules
Comprehensive amenities including free wifi, parking, and complimentary items
Significant discounts on private lessons for members

food_and_drink.notes: Complimentary coffee is available to members and their guests.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy.

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead system installed at the Bayville location.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, the facility does not specifically mention club rentals. You are welcome to use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: The facility provides complimentary coffee to members and their guests. There is no mention of outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It typically takes about 45 minutes for one player to complete 18 holes on a simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Birdhouse is an adult-oriented practice facility focused on serious training, and does not appear to be designed for children.
